songs.title: This Is Where The Party's At

lyrics.intro:
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh-way-oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh-way-oh
This is where the party's at
This is where the party's at
lyrics.verse1:
I've got a feeling that you're right
We're gonna need a little time tonight
Turn off the music and the lights
Come on and let me in

Your hand is shaking so fast
No way we're gonna try to make this last
But I can see you, so don't ask
Go on and break my heart
lyrics.pre_chorus:
She said
It's Saturday night; it's time to let this go
We've got everything to do but we should do it real slow
As a matter of fact there's nothing holding you back
She said
lyrics.chorus: Oh oh oh oh this is where the party's at (x3)
lyrics.verse2:
You take the air from my lungs
It's getting close but we're not nearly done
It's only fair you seem stunned
Somehow will work it out
lyrics.bridge:
Let's pretend there's one more hour 'til it all is gone, Ohhhh
And if the world is ending what do you want
Hey!, Hey!, Oh-way-oh, Hey!

lyrics.intro:
This feeling, We want it, The good life, I started
No reason, To flaunt it, Just show me, You got it

Hey! - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh-woah-oh
Hey! - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Hey! - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh-woah-oh
Hey! - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
lyrics.verse1:
I've got something I think I need to say
Wherever you go is where I want to stay, yeah
Well, I wanna know the good times
I wanna know the bad days
'Cause when I see your eyes
Wouldn't want it any other way
lyrics.pre_chorus:
I think that I'm right
God I hope you agree
For the rest of my life
lyrics.chorus:
What a wonderful world this could be

Hey! - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh-woah-oh - I know
Hey! - What a wonderful world this could be
Hey! - And no matter where we go
Hey! - What a wonderful world this could be
lyrics.verse2:
You know I'm not one to ever take things slow
Once I get started, it's hard to just let go, yeah
You met me at the right time
I was driving at the wrong speed
It was never on my mind
But I never know my needs
I was hopeless and scared
To find the reprise
For the rest of my life
lyrics.bridge:
Just repeat after me, okay?
This feeling, We want it, The good life, I started
No reason, To flaunt it, Just show me, You got it (X3)

lyrics.verse1:
I guess I knew it from the start
You were gonna break my heart
And never come back again
No pity for the weak of heart
No sinners in this worthless art
It's over while it all begins
lyrics.pre_chorus:
It's not like you were the last to know
I don't think there's rules for letting go
lyrics.chorus:
What are you waiting for?
Why don't you say it; just say it already
What are you waiting for?
Come on and say it; just say it already
We both know there is no miracle to save us
What are you waiting for
Why don't you say it; just say it already
lyrics.verse2:
After all your drunkalogues of what you were and who you are
And how you're going back again
Excuse me If it seems too bold but this feels like it is getting old

We were better off just friends
Let call this out; you've grown cynical
Sadly this all seems just so typical
lyrics.bridge:
I'll need a while just to save myself
How will you find sanity when you can't hardly think outside yourself

lyrics.verse1:
Remember when you first called me babe
Sitting in your car on New Year's Day
The only resolution that you made
Recalling last night you'd hesitate
Told me that you had to go away
There's only so much here that you can take
So I said
lyrics.chorus:
Time and again (whoa-whoa-oh)
Yeah, I was the last to know (whoa-whoa-oh)
There's never an end (whoa-whoa-oh)
So there's no use in letting go (whoa-whoa-oh)
Tell me again (whoa-whoa-oh)
Why did you have to go? (whoa-whoa-oh)
You call me a friend (whoa-whoa-oh)
But right when I need you
I couldn't see you
Time and again
lyrics.verse2:
You complicated every word you said
By sleeping in someone else's bed
The shades of blue that were now turning red
I never even saw you hesitate
No way that this could ever resonate
All and all what a brilliant mistake
I say…
lyrics.outro:
Remember when you first called me babe
Sitting in your car on New Year's Day
God I wish I could see you today

lyrics.verse1:
Sunday morning
Rain keeps pouring
Sky falls down again
Your mind's twisted
Your heart's slipping
Remember when you said…

You're never gonna need another love but me
Never gonna need another one
Yes I'm waiting for the ending where you promise me
Until you do it; do it
I watch you walk away and there you…
lyrics.chorus:
Go!
Meet me in the middle when you want me
I'll be there waiting for the fall… to say better luck next time
No!
No matter what you say I know you won't see
It's never what you hide; it's what you show
So I'll take it as a bright sign
To say better luck next time
lyrics.verse2:
You've been wasting
All you're facing
On the urge to mend
Your silent graces
All but traces
The outline of your sins

Cause you're breathing heavy in the wake of all you dream
Suffocating all the things you want
Cause you're calling out the names of who you used to be
So do it; do it
Before you sit around, I say you…
lyrics.bridge:
I remember it now
I've repressed it somehow
Tell me since you've been gone who's sorry now?
(yeah)

lyrics.verse1:
I know it's late
But I've been waiting for something
She caught the wind
From on top of the world
Well I lost myself when I found something I wanted
I don't want to lose the only thing I ever knew…
I do
lyrics.pre_chorus:
She wants a champion by the look on her face
I put the heart brakes on, 'cause I'm not ready to change
And I need your love, but I think it's in vain
All I know is
lyrics.chorus:
I love it when I see you smile

(whoa-whoa-oh-oh)
(whoa-whoa-oh-oh-whoa)
lyrics.verse2:
I can't explain
I think you're all that I've wanted
It feels like a shame
If you never knew
But the chemicals that seem to be around me
Give me false hope but the circumstance is true…
It's you
lyrics.bridge:
No I don't want to be in love
I got a feeling that it's true
No matter what I say I'm never over you
(yeah)

lyrics.verse1:
I dare you to make a move
Yeah, I dare you to try
See the world from a different view
Stay with me tonight

Well what the hell have you been thinking lately?
It looks to me like you don't even try
We've got nowhere left to run to baby
So no one's ever gonna save your life
Tonight
lyrics.chorus:
Just tell me what it takes for me to make you love me
(make you love me…tonight)
Yeah, tell me what it takes for me to make you love me
(make you love me)
Tonight
lyrics.verse2:
Tell me what's hurting you
Tell me where you hide
Show me the world I knew
Let me get close tonight

Do you like it when I beg you baby?
Do you want me on the floor tonight?
Do you love me or is this just safety
'Cause no one's ever gonna save your life
Tonight
lyrics.bridge:
You can say you let it go
Say it's what you want but you're a liar
'Cause time and time you don't and I know it's not enough for you
Tonight

lyrics.verse1:
Just put your arms around me
Hold me close; don't ever let me go
You seem so tired lately
And while you walk away
You say, this ain't good enough
We'll find a way tonight
So when you fell, yeah I stood you up
So come save me if you like
lyrics.chorus:
So just wake me up when you gotta go
I'll be waiting bags packed out by the door
Tell me is your heartbeat ready for more?
Oh I said whoa-whoa-oa-whoa

What makes you happy now?
lyrics.verse2:
Yeah
You told me come back baby
I'm already on my way to your door
And when I get there maybe
This time you're wide awake and
You say this ain't good enough
We'll find a way tonight
So when you fell, yeah I stood you up
So come save me if you like
lyrics.outro:
Oh yeah
Yeah, say whoa-whoa-oa-whoa
What makes you happy?
What makes you happy?
Whoa-whoa-oa-whoa
What makes you happy now?

lyrics.intro:
(One by one after all this time)
(One by one after all this time)
lyrics.verse1:
After I'm gone and they lay me down,
Will you think of me when the lights go out?
Will you call my name or curse me out?
For crying out loud

Well I had it all and let it go
And I'm back at the things that I used to know
Well I guess I need some levity
'Cause there's nothing left to take from me
lyrics.chorus:
After all this time I'm still picking up the pieces
(One by one after all this time)
After all this time I'm still picking up the pieces
(One by one after all this time)
lyrics.verse2:
After the wall and the rain came down
Well I found myself on common ground
Now I'm stuck inside a long ago
What do you want me to know?

In hell of all is the simple fact
That I am the joke I was laughing at
And I've said too much to ever leave
So blind my eyes cause I just can't see
lyrics.bridge:
Can we save it, save it or do we let it burn down?
Can we save it, save it or do we let it burn down?
After all this time I'm still thinking about it
Still thinking about it, after all this time

lyrics.verse1:
We would meet in the afternoon
Yeah, we'd talk till we see the moon
I would smile like a fool
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I never knew
lyrics.verse2:
She'd wear moon boots in June
Yeah, she'd never sing in tune
My wonderfully eccentric you
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I never knew
lyrics.bridge:
I've been waiting so long
To finally find someone
I often think
What if I knew you all along
lyrics.chorus:
Someday I'll find
Someone to fit the rhyme
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I'll ever find
lyrics.outro:
I would wait my life for you
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I never knew
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I never knew
She'll be the closest thing to heaven I never knew
